method: Rendered the rebuilt 16-page proof with pdftoppm after narrowing the proof conclusion to an ideal-model-calibrated test and tightening proof-only citation sentinels for arXiv:2511.06390 and arXiv:2601.17357. Verified pdfinfo reports 16 letter pages. Visually inspected the full-proof contact sheet plus pages 14, 15, and 16 at full size; the conclusion and references were legible with no clipping, overlap, blank page, or alignment defects.
